name: Lisa's Best Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Key lime juice or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until foamy.
2. Add cream of tartar and beat until stiff. Set aside.
3. Beat egg yolks with 1 cup beaten egg whites, mixing well.
4. Add condensed milk, lime juice, and grated rind.
5. Fold in remaining egg whites.
6. Pour into crust.
7. Bake until golden brown. Check at 15 minutes.
8. Chill and serve with whipped cream.
